title: Import-Export 3d Manufacturing File(.3mf)
description:
Import-Export 3d Manufacturing File(.3mf)

A professional-grade import-export add-on for handling 3D Manufacturing Format (3MF) files in Blender. This add-on bridges the gap between Blender and 3D printing software, providing seamless workflow integration for 3D printing projects.



Key Features

Import Capabilities

  • Smart Object Handling: Import 3MF files with complete object hierarchy preservation.
  • Merge Option: Optional ability to merge all objects into a single mesh.
  • Transform Support: Accurate handling of object transformations and components.
  • Collection Organization: Automatically organizes imported objects into collections.

Export Features

  • Selective Export: Choose between exporting selected objects or the entire scene.
  • Modifier Support: Option to apply modifiers during export.
  • World Space Coordinates: Accurate position and scale preservation.
  • Standard Compliance: Full compliance with 3MF specifications.

Technical Specifications

  • Compatible with Blender 3.0 and above.
  • Supports all major operating systems (Windows, macOS, Linux).
  • Lightweight and optimized for performance.
  • Regular updates and maintenance.

Use Cases

For 3D Printing Professionals

  • Direct workflow integration with 3D printing software.
  • Maintain precise object positioning and scaling.
  • Efficient handling of complex multi-part models.

For 3D Artists

  • Easy export of models for 3D printing.
  • Preserve model hierarchy and structure.
  • Reliable transfer between different 3D applications.

For Product Designers

  • Streamlined prototyping workflow.
  • Accurate dimensional control.
  • Efficient batch processing of multiple objects.

Technical Details

Import Features

  • Full support for 3MF file structure.
  • Namespace handling for compatibility.
  • Component reference resolution.
  • Transform matrix support.
  • Vertex and triangle data preservation.
  • Optional mesh merging capability.

Export Features

  • Complete 3MF specification compliance.
  • Proper XML structure generation.
  • Relationship handling.
  • Content type management.
  • World space transformation support.
  • Modifier stack integration.

Installation and Usage

Easy Installation

  1. Download the add-on.
  2. Open Blender Preferences.
  3. Install via the Add-ons section.
  4. Enable the add-on.

Simple Workflow

  • Import: File > Import > 3D Manufacturing File (*.3mf)
  • Export: File > Export > 3D Manufacturing File (*.3mf)

Support and Updates

  • Regular maintenance updates.
  • Bug fix support.
  • Technical documentation.
  • Email support for issues.

Requirements

  • Blender 3.0 or newer.
  • 64-bit operating system.
  • Basic Blender knowledge.

Pricing

Why Choose This Add-on?

  • Professional-grade implementation.
  • Optimized performance.
  • Regular updates.
  • Technical support.
  • Workflow efficiency improvement.

Note to Customers

This add-on is actively maintained and updated. Your feedback and suggestions are welcome and help improve the product for everyone.

Support Blender Foundation

We believe in giving back to the community that makes our work possible. Every month, we dedicate a portion of our plugin's revenue to support the Blender Foundation. Thank you for helping us contribute to the future of open-source creativity.
